name: Sticker Studio
description: A collectible sticker wall with build-time generated art in the Toybox style.
features: A generated full-screen background and a hero header image baked into the bundle
Users post a sticker caption to a shared wall
Art uses one consistent Toybox style line; degrades to gradients if generation is unavailable
No external URLs — all art lives under ./assets

ui.layout: card over a generated background, hero image at the top

acceptance: generate_image writes assets/bg.jpg and assets/hero.jpg before code references them
Code references generated art only via relative ./assets/ paths
Every prompt reuses one Toybox style line and says 'no text'
If generation is unavailable the app still renders with gradients/emoji
